prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年兰州大学在天津市综合科类的最低录取位次分别为：2021年约6697名、2022年约6376名、2023年约6479名、2024年约5851名、2025年约6772名。整体 呈现波动走势，2024年达到近五年最优（5851名），但2025年大幅后移至6772名，较2024年后移约921位，为近五年次高位。近两年波动幅度较大，显示报考热度存在不确定性。\ n兰州大学在天津市综合科类的招生计划：2021年79人、2022年80人、2023年80人、2024年80人、2025年87人、2026年（依据最新招生计划文件）90人。2026年计 划较2025年增加3人，扩招幅度约3.4%，属小幅扩招，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家"985工程"和"211工程"重点建设 高校，入选"双一流"建设高校名单。在2026年软科中国大学排名中位列第40名，属于全国顶尖高校行列，综合实力雄厚；2026年高考周期内，兰州大学声誉评价 为偏正面。主要事件为一名硕士毕业生在毕业论文致谢中感谢学校保卫部默许拾荒老人进校，展现了校园的人文关怀温度，该事件在网络上获得广泛传播和正面评价，提升了学校 的社会形象。抖音平台热度评级为"较热"，总排名第53位，综合热度约58.9万，在985高校中处于中等偏上水平，表明考生关注度较高。历史投档异常记录中未见兰州大学有明显 断档信号；在第五轮学科评估中，兰州大学拥有生态学（A+）、草学（A+）两个顶尖学科，以及化学（A-）、地理学（A-）、生物学（A-）三个A级学科。生态 学与草学均为全国顶尖水平，化学、地理学、生物学实力突出。这些优势学科与该校在天津招生的化学类、地理科学类、生物科学类、大气科学类等专业高度关联，对相关方向考 生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2024年高考周期中被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会热度持续走高；临床医学、口腔医 学等医学类专业保持"推荐"热度；法学呈"分化观望"态势；新闻传播学、工商管理类则呈"明显劝退"趋势。天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年的71938人增加约10 062人，增幅约14%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。天津市综合类本科批省控线近年稳中有升（2021年463分→2025年476分）；兰州大学位于甘肃省兰州市，距天津市较远，属于跨省就读。该校在天津市的招生计划占比较小（约80-90人），属于典型的跨省招生格局。天津考生对东部沿海及京 津冀地区高校有较强的地域偏好，兰州大学的地理位置相对偏远，在一定程度上影响部分考生的报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年位次已处于近五年高位（6772 名），2026年招生计划小幅扩招3.4%对位次有轻微推升作用，天津市考生总数大幅增加约14%将加剧整体竞争，学校声誉偏正面和抖音热度较热可能吸引更多关注，但兰州大学地 理位置偏远对天津考生有一定抑制作用。在，考虑考生规模扩大和声誉提升带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年最低录取位次约为6962名，位次区间 为6462–7462名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6962名，区间6462–7462名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生：以二档专业为主力选择（化学类、法学、汉语言文学、工商管理类等），一档专业（计算机类、电子信息 类、数学类、临床医学类）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（新闻传播学类、经济学类、外语类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（6462名以内）的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（7462名附近）的考生应以三档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were: approximately 6697 in 2021, 6376 in 2022, 6479 in 2023, 5851 in 2024, and 6772 in 2025. Overall, it shows a fluctuating trend, with 2024 being the best in the past five years (5851), but 2025 saw a significant drop to 6772, a decrease of about 921 places from 2024, marking the second highest in the past five years. The large fluctuations in the past two years indicate uncertainty in application popularity.
Lanzhou University's enrollment plan in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 79 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 87 in 2025, and 90 in 2026 (based on the latest enrollment plan document). The 2026 plan increases by 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 3.4%, which is a small expansion and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national "985 Project" and "211 Project" key construction universities, and selected into the "Double First-Class" construction university list. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 40th, belonging to the top tier of national universities with strong comprehensive strength; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Lanzhou University's reputation evaluation is relatively positive. A major event involved a master's graduate thanking the school's security department in their thesis acknowledgment for allowing a waste-picking elderly person to enter the campus, showcasing the campus's humanistic care, which gained widespread dissemination and positive evaluation online, enhancing the school's social image. On the Douyin platform, the heat rating is "relatively hot," ranking 53rd overall, with a comprehensive heat of about 589,000, placing it at an upper-middle level among 985 universities, indicating high candidate attention. No obvious signal of admission gaps has been observed in historical admission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Lanzhou University has two top-tier disciplines: Ecology (A+) and Grassland Science (A+), as well as three A-level disciplines: Chemistry (A-), Geography (A-), and Biology (A-). Ecology and Grassland Science are both at the national top level, while Chemistry, Geography, and Biology have outstanding strength. These advantageous disciplines are highly correlated with majors such as Chemistry, Geographical Sciences, Biological Sciences, and Atmospheric Sciences offered in Tianjin, strongly attracting candidates interested in these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering were rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" during the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, with social heat continuing to rise; medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintained "recommended" heat; Law showed a "divergent wait-and-see" trend; Journalism and Communication, and Business Administration showed a "clear discouragement" trend. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 71,938 in 2025, an increase of about 14%, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line for Tianjin's comprehensive undergraduate batch has been steadily rising in recent years (463 in 2021 → 476 in 2025); Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu Province, far from Tianjin, requiring cross-province study. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin accounts for a small proportion (about 80-90 students), representing a typical cross-province enrollment pattern. Tianjin candidates have a strong regional preference for universities in the eastern coastal and Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei regions, and Lanzhou University's relatively remote geographical location somewhat affects some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the 2025 ranking is already at a five-year high (6772), the 2026 enrollment plan's small expansion of 3.4% has a slight upward effect on rankings, the significant increase of about 14% in Tianjin's total candidate number will intensify overall competition, the school's positive reputation and relatively hot Douyin heat may attract more attention, but Lanzhou University's remote geographical location has a certain inhibitory effect on Tianjin candidates. Taking into account the intensified competition due to the expanded candidate pool and reputation enhancement, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 6962, with a ranking range of 6462–7462.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 6962, range 6462–7462. Candidates within the predicted ranking range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chemistry, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, etc.) as primary choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, etc.) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Journalism and Communication, Economics, Foreign Languages, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 6462) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 7462) should primarily choose Tier 3 majors.
